---
applyTo: ".github/skills/**/SKILL.md"
---

Skill edits must preserve the folder-name/frontmatter-name match and keep the
description narrow enough that the skill only fires for its actual lane.

Do not put generic engineering advice in global skills. Keep project-specific
landmines, gates, exact commands, and handoff contracts; move long examples,
research, or templates into lazy references under the skill folder.

When a skill calls another KB lane, name the lane explicitly instead of relying
on ambient discovery.
